calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Petitioner is allowed to withdraw the Petition for Forfeiture and may proceed with Non-Judicial Forfeiture proceedings. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Document;S Petitioner'S First Setof Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (612/EAH)
